PowerShell($src = "C:\\ERP-GAS\\catalogo-solac-v2\\v1_unpacked\\ppt\\media"; $dst = "C:\\ERP-GAS\\catalogo-solac-v2\\clean_v2"; $map = @{"image-6-2.png"="descarga_transporte.png";"image-6-3.png"="carburacion.png";"image-6-4.png"="dispensario.png";"image-6-5.png"="autotanque.png";"image-6-6.png"="bascula.png";"image-6-7.png"="display_2x2.png";"image-6-8.png"="hub_lemon.png";"image-6-9.png"="medidor_magnetico.png";"image-6-10.png"="sensor_ultrasonico_set.png";"image-6-11.png"="sensor_presion.png";"image-6-12.png"="sensor_temperatura.png";"image-6-13.png"="termopozo.png"}; foreach\($k in $map.Keys\){ Copy-Item "$src\\$k" "$dst\\$\($map[$k]\)" -Force }; Get-ChildItem $dst | Sort-Object Name | Select-Object Name, Length | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell($tools = @\("soffice", "libreoffice", "C:\\Program Files\\LibreOffice\\program\\soffice.exe", "C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\LibreOffice\\program\\soffice.exe"\); foreach\($t in $tools\){ $cmd = Get-Command $t -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if\($cmd\){ "FOUND: $\($cmd.Source\)" } elseif\(Test-Path $t\){ "FOUND: $t" } else { "MISSING: $t" } })

PowerShell(try { $pp = New-Object -ComObject PowerPoint.Application; "PowerPoint COM available: $\($pp.Version\)"; $pp.Quit\(\); [System.Runtime.Interopservices.Marshal]::ReleaseComObject\($pp\) | Out-Null } catch { "PowerPoint COM not available: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
PowerShell(python -c "from playwright.sync_api import sync_playwright; p=sync_playwright\(\).start\(\); b=p.chromium.launch\(\); print\('chromium OK', b.version\); b.close\(\); p.stop\(\)")

PowerShell($cutoff = \(Get-Date\).AddMinutes\(-30\); Get-ChildItem "C:\\Users\\PC\\AppData\\Local\\Temp" -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { \($_.Extension -in '.jpg','.png','.jpeg'\) -and $_.LastWriteTime -gt $cutoff } | Select-Object Name, LastWriteTime, @{N='KB';E={[int]\($_.Length/1024\)}} | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Format-Table -AutoSize)
